raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a fraudulent charge of {$9000.00} was made on my Citibank credit card ending in XXXX to a merchant named XXXX, XXXX. After noticing the charge, I immediately contacted Citibank to dispute the transaction, believing it to be fraudulent. Despite my efforts to dispute the charge, Citibank denied my dispute based on the claim that too much time had passed. However, the charge was made to a company that has since been confirmed to have operated a Ponzi scheme, as stated by the SEC and a XXXX XXXX XXXX. 



I have received a victim notification from the FBI, confirming my status as a victim of fraud. Despite my attempts to resolve the issue, Citibank has failed to adequately address my dispute, and I am requesting their assistance in reopening the dispute and issuing a credit for the fraudulent charge. 



The Citi statement showing the {$9000.00} charge is attached as Exhibit F. Citibanks actions and failure to investigate this matter have caused undue financial stress and confusion.
